case_title: HAHN, VICTORIA VS AN AFFAIR TO REMEMBER DBA VIX, KEN et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HAHN, VICTORIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AN AFFAIR TO REMEMBER DBA VIX, KEN AN AFFAIR TO REMEMBER DBA PATTERSON, CHUCK $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,530.00, MIKE MOUSA AND DIANA MASOERO ARE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AND ARE REPLACED BY VICTORIA HAHN AS PLAINTIFF AND CROSS DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERT MAIL TO AN AFFAIR TO REMBER, KEN CHUCK PATTERSON, OWNER RETURNED TO COURT SIGNED.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT AN AFFAIR TO REMEMBER DBA VIX, KEN AN AFFAIR TO REMEMBER DBA PATTERSON, CHUCK IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT HAHN, VICTORIA PROOF OF SERVICE WAIVED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERTIFIED MAILING TO MIKE MOUSA RETURNED TO COURT: UNCLAIMED.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY HAHN, VICTORIA AS TO DEFENDANT AN AFFAIR TO REMEMBER DBA VIX, KEN AN AFFAIR TO REMEMBER DBA PATTERSON, CHUCK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-20-2002 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL

CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $1,586.88 FILED BY AN AFFAIR TO REMEMBER DBA VIX, KEN AN AFFAIR TO REMEMBER DBA PATTERSON, CHUCK AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT HAHN, VICTORIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-20-2002 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
CERTIFIED MAILING TO DIANA MASOERO RETURNED TO COURT SIGNED.
